file_title: Annual Brand Day Recap: Elexion Automotive
introduction: This presentation provides an overview of our recent annual brand day with a focus on our brand identity elements. We will review the main themes and choices that shaped this annual event.

subsections.heading: Annual Brand Day: Event Overview
subsections.content:
• Event was held on May 18th, 2022 at the company headquarters
• Attended by all employees and key stakeholders
• The event featured keynote presentations, workshops, and product demonstrations
• The event aimed to reinforce the brand's commitment to sustainable manufacturing
• Over 50% of the company's employees participated in the organization of the event
• The event received widespread media coverage, boosting the company's image
• Feedback from attendees was overwhelmingly positive, with a 95% satisfaction rate
subsections.justification: The content discusses the event overview, not the color theme selected for the event.

subsections.heading: Brand Identity: Color Theme Selection
subsections.content:
• The color theme selection process involved the marketing and design teams
• Considered factors included the company's brand identity, market trends, and customer preferences
• Extensive market research was conducted to inform the decision
• The chosen color theme is expected to resonate with our target audience
• The color theme will be implemented across all branding materials
• The decision was made after several rounds of deliberation and testing
• The color theme aligns with our brand's focus on sustainability and innovation
subsections.justification: This slide talks about the process of color theme selection, not the specific color chosen.

subsections.heading: Impact of Brand Day on Market Perception
subsections.content:
• Post-event surveys show improved market perception of Elexion Automotive
• The event led to a 15% increase in social media followers
• Significant media coverage resulted in increased brand visibility
• The event reinforced Elexion's position as a leader in affordable EVs
• The brand day helped to highlight Elexion's commitment to sustainability
• 80% of event attendees reported a more positive perception of the brand
• Overall positive impact on customer loyalty and brand recall
subsections.justification: The content focuses on the impact of the brand day on market perception, not the color theme chosen for the event.

conclusion: The color theme chosen for the brand day was a strategic decision that reflects our brand identity. Moving forward, we will continue to incorporate these elements into our marketing efforts to drive brand recognition.

image_queries.slide_title: Impact of Brand Day on Market Perception
